notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Trey Yesavage. Kevin McGonigle scores. Dillon Dingler to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Hao-Yu  Lee GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Hao-Yu Lee grounds into a double play, shortstop Andrés Giménez to second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Spencer Torkelson out at 2nd. Hao-Yu Lee out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Yohendrick Piñango.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Torkelson walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Torkelson doubles (9) on a line drive to right fielder Jesús Sánchez. Matt Vierling scores. Zach McKinstry to 2nd. Spencer Torkelson to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Burch Smith picks off Yohendrick Piñango at 1st on throw to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.

notableEvents.label: Ernie Clement GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ernie Clement grounds into a double play, shortstop Kevin McGonigle to second baseman Hao-Yu Lee to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Jesús Sánchez out at 2nd. Ernie Clement out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: George Springer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: George Springer grounds into a double play, third baseman Gage Workman to second baseman Hao-Yu Lee to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Brandon Valenzuela out at 2nd. George Springer out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler singles on a ground ball to second baseman Ernie Clement. Dillon Dingler to 2nd. Dillon Dingler advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Ernie Clement.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Torkelson doubles (9) on a line drive to right fielder Jesús Sánchez. Matt Vierling scores. Zach McKinstry to 2nd. Spencer Torkelson to 1st.
